game_info.title: Mr. Jump: Polygon Adventure
game_info.concept:
Meet Mr Jump, your new favorite guy! Help him on jumping his way through the different ingenious and tricky levels!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/mr-jump/id955157084

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Meet Mr Jump, your new favorite guy! Help him on jumping his way through the different ingenious and tricky levels!

---------------------------------------
App Store Best of 2015!
---------------------------------------

Testimonials:

Touch Arcade 4/5
“This shouldn't be so hard. Famous last words, those are, in that strange world of gaming where we can die again and again. Mr Jump is really, really hard. It doesn't even ease you in, at least compared to other games.”

PocketGamer 7/10
“It's a hateful experience, and you'll probably swear your entire face off while you're playing, but you'll still wrap your clammy palms around your phone and try to get to the end.”

148Apps 4/5
“You’ll keep chipping away at the stage, keen to get further and come across something even harder along the way.”

TechCrunch
“Gameplay is challenging without being infuriating, and rewards the kind of hardcore pattern memorization that made classic titles for Atari and NES so fun to play. It’s also refreshing to see something other than an endless runner manage this kind of one-button simplicity.”

Gamezebo
“Mr Jump Is the Game Everyone Will Be Playing This Month”

Macworld
“Flappy Bird fans, platformer lovers, and masochists alike will enjoy Mr Jump. This free game is already shooting up the App Store charts and with good reason. Go see what all of the fuss is about.”

Test your reflexes, timing, and precision in this fast-paced platform game that’s as simple as it is addicting. Mr. Jump offers endless fun and challenging levels to keep you on your toes.

Features
One-Tap Gameplay: Simple tapping gameplay, very easy to learn but hard to master.
Challenging Levels: Explore a variety of vibrant worlds with unique obstacles.
Compete with Friends: Challenge your friends for the highest score and prove you’re the best jumper.
Catchy Soundtrack: Immerse yourself in the game with catchy music that sticks in your head.
No Wifi mode : Perfect for both online and offline adventures, play with no wifi needed!

Ready to leap into action with 2 times the fun? Download Mister Jump for free now and show off your skills in this fun, addicting, and classic runner and dash adventure! This flappy yet thrilling jump game is a top-tier casual experience, suitable for boys, girls, teens, and adults of all ages.

Jump into cool fun. Jump with Mr. Jump!
game_info.description: Welcome to Mr. Jump's Polygon Adventure! Take control of our blocky hero in this challenging, fast-paced precision platformer. Navigate through a vibrant, procedurally generated world filled with treacherous spikes, precarious platforms, and bottomless pits. Your goal is simple: survive the obstacle course and reach the finish line. Master the physics of momentum and jump height to overcome increasingly difficult level segments. Collect golden orbs for extra points and try to achieve a perfect run!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Right: Move Forward (Run)
- Arrow Left: Slow Down / Move Backward
- Space / Arrow Up: Jump (Hold for higher jump)
- Enter: Start Game
- P / Esc: Pause / Unpause
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over or Pause)

TEST_1.test_description: Random Input Monkey Test. The automated agent will press random movement and jump keys to stress test the physics engine and collision stability.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The agent generates random inputs (Left, Right, Jump) every few frames. This checks for crashes during chaotic input sequences and ensures the player entity doesn't clip through walls or get stuck in invalid states.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game should run without errors or crashes. The player will likely die quickly, triggering the GAME_OVER_LOSE state, or remain stuck against a wall, but the application state must remain valid throughout.

TEST_2.test_description: Heuristic Runner Bot. The automated agent attempts to complete the level using raycast-based obstacle detection.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The agent scans the area immediately in front of the player. If a spike or pit is detected within a critical distance, the agent triggers a jump. It constantly holds the 'Right' key to progress.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The agent should navigate basic obstacles successfully. While not perfect (it may fail complex patterns), it demonstrates the playability of the level and the responsiveness of the controls. Success is reaching 50% distance or winning.

TEST_3.test_description: Physics Integrity Test. Checks if gravity and collisions are consistently applied.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The agent jumps repeatedly in place. The system monitors the y-position to ensure the player consistently returns to the ground level and doesn't sink into platforms.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player y-position should oscillate but always return to the baseline ground value when landed. No drift in position or velocity accumulation should occur.
